changes: 👤 Account Visibility: Added a new section in Settings to display the currently logged-in Google account.
🚪 Secure Logout: Introduced a dedicated logout button in Settings for easy sign-out and account switching.
✨ UI Polish: Improved the login screen layout for a cleaner, perfectly centered visual experience.
🛠️ Core Optimization: Fixed background compilation errors to ensure more reliable and stable app updates.
title: UI && Google Login
